title: Sour Tender Saudi Prawns Ceviche
description: A bright, tangy Saudi‑inspired ceviche featuring tender king prawns marinated in a citrusy, herbaceous sauce, perfect for a kid‑friendly lunch.
instructions: Thaw the prawns if frozen; rinse under cold water and pat dry.
Slice the prawns into bite‑size cubes.
In a bowl whisk together lemon juice, lime juice, olive oil, salt, pepper, cumin, coriander, garlic, and jalapeño.
Add the diced onion and cilantro, then fold in the prawns, tossing to coat evenly.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30–45 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more salt or lime juice.
Serve immediately chilled, garnished with extra cilantro or sliced cucumber if desired.
